## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential engagement for Marcel Santilli's company fwd.digital to provide content marketing services to Mark Heynen's startup knap.ai](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [knap.ai is launching an app that allows running AI automations locally to address data privacy concerns](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [fwd.digital's content marketing approach involves creating high-quality content at scale using AI writing workflows with human oversight](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [They discussed kicking off a 3-month engagement for fwd.digital to produce 100k+ words/month of content for $9k/month](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Key next steps are finalizing the agreement, creating a shared Slack channel, and kicking off the engagement on 5/12](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1781.0)

## Topics

### knap.ai's Business and Product

  - [knap.ai allows downloading an app to run AI automations locally on the user's device to avoid data privacy issues](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Targeting finance, healthcare and other industries dealing with sensitive data](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Currently in private beta, launching publicly in 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Bottom-up product-led growth is the planned go-to-market approach](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)

### fwd.digital's Content Marketing Services

  - [Use AI writing workflows with human oversight to produce high-quality content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Typical engagement: 100k+ words/month for $9k/month with 3-month minimum commitment](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1217.0)
  - [Includes strategy, keyword research, workflow setup, content production, publishing](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [Dedicated writer/editor assigned to each client for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=981.0)

### Potential Engagement Details

  - [$9k/month covers all tools except eventually getting knap.ai's own AirOps instance](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1561.0)
  - [Kickoff targeted for 5/12 to align resources](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1791.0)
  - [In parallel, fwd.digital to advise on building domain authority for new website](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send Slack channel invite to kick things off](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
  - [Finalize agreement and logistics for 5/12 kickoff](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [fwd.digital to provide recommendations on building domain authority quickly](https://fathom.video/share/3ZwjxwCNrbMpPoYMUwSijjV2MNdUGBt8?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
